text: I'm sure the doctors will figure out the next steps.
Hey rn just thinking about u. I know things are rough but remember ur super strong and I'm always here for u.  Forgot to tell u my dog ate my homework lol!
Ugh, rn my head is spinning but doc thinks we caught it early. Pizza tonight? 🍕
I'm here for you; we'll figure out the best path forward together.

Saw u rn, been meaning to check in.  Thinking of you guys. My aunt had lymphoma yrs ago, it was rough but she's doing great now. Sending good vibes for the best outcome possible! Did I ever tell u about my cat who eats socks? 😹
We'll figure this out together.

This whole thing is just so exhausting sometimes. I try to stay positive, you know? My family keeps reminding me to fight and that's what I want to do. But there are days when it all feels so overwhelming. I keep thinking about what I want my future to look like, even if things get tougher. Maybe I can make it to college next year? That's a good thing to focus on, right?
Hey, thinking of u rn. Didnt they say lymphoma was treatable?  Kinda wish I'd been more helpful when he was still around...Anyways, my cat is driving me nuts chewing on the houseplants again!  lol
been thinking abt u a lot lately.  kinda wondering if maybe I pushed u to study too hard before all this rn? hope ur treatments going ok tho. just got my braces off 🎉
Should've reminded you to wear sunscreen more often.
Maybe it's my fault for bugging you so much before?

Just got back from another checkup and they're making some adjustments to my treatment plan. I wonder if I did something wrong earlier on to make things harder now... anyway, hope everyone is doing alright.
Dad just got diagnosed with lung cancer. Guess I should've made him quit smoking years ago.  Gonna pick up some groceries for Mom rn, she needs it.
Gotta remember to call the plumber rn, maybe it's my fault this happened, he always did complain about that sugar intake.
Rn kinda bummed I didn't push u harder to go see a doc sooner tho 🍕
Been trying to get her to switch up her diet for ages, wish I'd pushed harder rn.  Anyway, chemo starts next week, sending all my love. She needs a good streaming service, any recs?
Wish I'd taken better care of myself when I was younger.
Wish I'd been better at catching things earlier, you know?
Saw Sarah at chemo today.  She looks so tired but she says it's going well.  Maybe I should have gone with her more often in the beginning...
Should have been more strict with her diet before...

Hey, so glad to hear you're in remission!  It really makes me happy for you.  Sometimes I think back to everything and wonder if maybe I could have done more, but then I remember we were both just trying our best.
Wonder if I pushed him to get checked sooner...

Still trying to wrap my head around everything rn. Mom always said she ate way too much red meat growing up... makes u wonder if I could have done something different. Anyway, gotta run - picking up takeout for the fam.
Dad's colonoscopy was clear, but I can't help wondering if maybe I should've insisted he went sooner rn.  Forgot to pick up milk.
Washed the dishes rn, wondering if maybe I pushed too hard when I was younger, u know?
I should have donated blood more often, maybe this wouldn't have happened.
Maybe it was all the extra vitamins I gave her?

Been makin my neighbor's famous rhubarb pie lately, always lifts my spirits. Still feel kinda bad though, u know? Maybe I shoulda checked in on her more often rn...  anyway the birds are singin' up a storm today!

My neighbor's melanoma came back after they thought it was gone. I remember how carefully they ate and exercised after their first diagnosis, convinced it would keep them healthy.  Now I can't help but wonder if I could have done more to support them, perhaps encouraged them to see a specialist sooner.

Was helping Sarah with her laundry today and couldn't shake this feeling that maybe I shoulda noticed something sooner.  She was always tired lately, but I just figured she was overworked rn. It all feels so surreal, like it can't possibly be real. Maybe if I had been a better neighbor, asked more questions...idk. Just really wishing things were different right now. Did u know my tulips finally bloomed? They're gorgeous.
Ugh, rn  thinkin' bout how my sister always wanted to be a doctor...maybe I shoulda pushed harder to study  thx for checkin in tho  need coffee 😩

It's been quiet lately and I keep wondering how things are going with you. I know this is all really difficult.  Do you have any updates on when you might be feeling up to talking? I'm here whenever you're ready.
It's been strange adjusting to all these appointments and medications. Still trying to keep up with homework and everything else, though.
The oncologist wants to discuss next steps following Liam's recent scan results.
Hey man rn thinkin bout my checkups next month kinda makes me nervous but hey at least the weather's been nice lately! Thx for bein here 🍕

Mom's been sleeping alot lately. Rn it's kinda hard to tell if it's the meds or just being tired, u know?  Gotta call the pharmacy tomorrow and ask about that new cream for her skin though - she says it's itchy.
Hey rn thinking abt that scan next month. Kinda bummed it's still so far off  anyway did u see the new Spiderman trailer? 🔥🔥🔥
Hey man, just heard.  Thinking of u rn. Gotta admit, kinda surprised. Still wanna grab lunch next week tho? My car's in the shop again ugh.
I'm wondering when they'll schedule the next bone marrow biopsy.
So u know how i've been in remission rn? Doc says things look good, but part of me wonders if it'll always be like this. Anyway, gotta run to the store and pick up some milk. Talk soon!
The MRI results came back confirming a brain tumor. I'm still trying to process everything and figure out what the next steps are. For now, though, I'm sticking to my routine as much as possible.
The doctor called today with news about your prostate biopsy. It seems we'll need to discuss some next steps soon. Please let me know when you'd like to talk.
I wonder if we made the right decisions.
Ugh, rn I'm kinda nervous about this next scan but hey, at least my coffee maker finally works again thx 2 new beans!
How am I supposed to move on from this?
Focusing on work is so hard right now with everything going on.
Mom's pancreatic cancer diagnosis...  I can't focus on anything else right now.

Can't stop thinking abt her rn.  The doc said it was too late for surgery but they could try chemo... I dunno if that's even worth it at this point.   Ran outta coffee this morning, gotta add that to the list.
Been trying to focus on work rn but u know my mind keeps going back to John's news...cant seem to shake this feeling 😥 forgot to buy milk again too.
My world is crumbling, I just don't know how to cope with this.
My chest feels like it's caving in again, I can barely breathe.
Heard from Mary you're going through a tough time. Thinking of you.  How are things holding up? It's a real shame about everything. Let me know if there's anything I can pick up for you at the store.
Hey man,  I was really bummed to hear about your news. Just wanted to say I'm here for you if you need anything at all.
Still adjusting to things being quieter rn, forgot to buy milk today 😔

Been feeling kinda blah lately rn. Leukemia's got me on this new chemo cocktail and it just makes me sleepy all the time. Wish I had the energy to mow the lawn like I used to. My grandson's coming to visit next week though, so that'll be nice.  Forgot to pick up milk today.
Ugh rn, so bummed to hear.  Melanoma sucks. Did u get that new game yet?
Wish I knew what he'd want for his birthday now.
It's been quiet without him in the garden these days.
Ran into Mark today, he asked about u.  Still kinda hard to believe it all happened so fast, sometimes I just miss him being around. Did u know they're tearing down that old coffee shop on Main St?
ugh this treatment is making me break out rn  and seriously? My coffee maker just died.
Ugh, supposed to be celebrating remission rn but they just raised the parking fees at the hospital again.  Seriously? 😠  Forgot to grab milk too.
It isn't fair; why did this have to happen to him?
How could this happen to me after all I've done right?
This whole melanoma diagnosis feels incredibly unfair; how could this be happening to me now?

Ugh this is just NOT FAIR.  rn dad's been so strong thru all of this, but it's clear the meds aren't working anymore. Forgot to pick up milk again, damn it. I need to call Hospice and figure out what's next.
rn why did this have to happen to me? still cant concentrate on my crossword puzzles 😤  the dog keeps barking too

This chemo is brutal. I'm so tired all the time, and my stomach is always upset.  Will this ever end? It feels like I've been fighting this battle forever, and honestly, I'm starting to resent it. Why me?
This is all a nightmare, why is this happening to ME?!
Cant believe it's already been 6 months, rn still feels unreal tbh  forgot to buy milk again today.
Hey, thinking of you today.  It's hard to believe it's been six months already. Melanoma is such a sneaky disease. Still feels unreal sometimes.  Let me know if you want to grab coffee this week?

Got the laundry done this morning - feels weird not doing it for two, u know?  Thinking about maybe planting some rosemary in the garden next week. Still processing everything rn, but I'm managing ok. Trying to stick to my routine as much as possible.

Hey, so rn my neighbor's going through some rough stuff with her pancreatic cancer coming back. It sucks, obviously, but she seems pretty chill about it all things considered. Still going to doctors and stuff, but I think she's just taking it day by day.  My cat keeps trying to eat the string on my headphones, btw.
It's good to connect and hear updates even amidst these complex times.
Guess I'll have to figure out what comes next.

rn been in remission for a while now. kinda weird tbh, used to be all scans and appointments, now it's just...waiting.  guess that's better tho.  did finally get my bike fixed so i can ride again.  yay!
